title: Data-driven surrogate material model for the mechanical simulation of additively manufactured architected weaves
abstract: • A fast surrogate material model for architected AM weaves is presented. • The training data is created using an automated labeling process. • The labeling finds the weaves’ internal forces using full-field displacement tests. • The results show a mean accuracy of above 90% for both normalized load and shape. Additively Manufacturing (AM) textiles enables the fabrication of architected structures that have tuned local mechanical properties to customize their design, e.g. , for personalization to the human body. For the inverse design of architected AM textiles, creating a computationally efficient mechanical simulation is still a major challenge. Continuum mechanics approaches lose their inherent simulation speed for the high element count that is required to simulate spatially varying designs and yarn-level behavior. Truss-based textile simulations typically have a low simulation time and high adaptivity, but the complexity of textile mechanics is challenging to model using simple truss elements. In this paper, we model weave structures as planar trusses with truss elements that have variable stiffness depending on strain, textile shear and textile design. We present an automated framework to evaluate the correlation between textile design, textile deformation and textile mechanics on a truss member level. This correlation is modeled using a discrete constitutive manifold, whose datapoints represent an empirical surrogate for traditional constitutive models. A design-sensitive surrogate material model formulated as an Artificial Neural Network (ANN) is trained on the constitutive manifold and is validated by evaluating the simulation accuracy of textile samples that vary their weave direction. The results show the capability of the ANN to simulate AM weaves with spatially varying designs on the order of seconds. This paves the way towards an efficient inverse design of architected AM textiles.
topics: Innovations in Concrete and Construction Materials
title_cn: 基于数据驱动的替代材料模型用于增材制造架构编织物的机械仿真
abstract_cn:
• 提出了一个用于架构增材制造（AM）织物的快速替代材料模型。  
• 训练数据通过自动标记过程生成。  
• 标记过程通过全场位移测试找到织物的内部力。  
• 结果显示，归一化载荷和形状的平均准确率均超过90%。  

增材制造（AM）纺织品使得能够制造具有调谐局部机械性能的架构结构，以定制其设计，例如，针对人体的个性化需求。对于架构增材制造纺织品的逆向设计，创建一个计算效率高的机械仿真仍然是一个主要挑战。连续介质力学方法在模拟空间变化设计和纱线级行为所需的高单元数时，失去了其固有的仿真速度。基于桁架的纺织仿真通常具有较低的仿真时间和较高的适应性，但纺织力学的复杂性使得使用简单的桁架元素进行建模具有挑战性。在本文中，我们将织物结构建模为平面桁架，桁架元素的刚度根据应变、纺织剪切和纺织设计而变化。我们提出了一个自动化框架，以评估纺织设计、纺织变形和纺织力学在桁架构件层面之间的相关性。该相关性通过离散本构流形进行建模，其数据点代表了传统本构模型的经验替代。我们构建了一个设计敏感的替代材料模型，采用人工神经网络（ANN）形式，并在本构流形上进行训练，通过评估变化织物方向的纺织样本的仿真准确性进行验证。结果表明，ANN能够在几秒钟内模拟具有空间变化设计的增材制造织物。这为架构增材制造纺织品的高效逆向设计铺平了道路。

journal_name: Journal of Construction Engineering and Management
title: Key Competencies Necessary for Advancing Human–Wearable Robot Interactions in the Construction Industry: A Systematic Review
abstract: Wearable robots have been proposed as a potential solution to the growing problem of work-related musculoskeletal disorders (WMSDs) in the construction industry. However, significant barriers to wearable robot adoption exists, specifically a lack of training programs to sufficiently train the workforce and a lack of clearly defined competency frameworks for workforce readiness. As a result, this study presents a comprehensive Preferred Reporting Items for Systematic Reviews and Meta Analysis (PRIMSA)-compliant systematic literature review (SLR) of the key knowledge, skills, and abilities needed to implement human–wearable robot (HWR) interactions in the construction industry. A literature search was conducted using the Scopus academic database, which yielded 97 articles. All articles were subjected to a qualitative content analysis, and inclusion/exclusion criteria were applied, resulting in 61 articles to address the research objectives. The SLR findings revealed an increasing publication trend on HWR interactions between 2014 and 2024. Findings show that the majority of the studies were conducted across all continents, with the exception of Africa, where no relevant studies were identified. A total of 68 competencies were identified, categorized into knowledge (such as engineering principles and human-body mechanics) (32 competencies), skills (such as wearable robot operations and ergonomic evaluation) (20 competencies), and abilities (such as analytical thinking and adaptability) (16 competencies). To develop the identified competencies, a conceptual framework for advancing HWR interaction was designed. The framework suggests the need for professional and educational program reforms, as well as industry–academic collaboration, to develop competencies and advance HWR interactions. Finally, knowledge gaps in existing studies were identified, and recommendations were made for future research.
title_cn: 推进建筑行业人机可穿戴机器人交互所需的关键能力：系统性综述
abstract_cn: 可穿戴机器人被提议作为解决建筑行业日益严重的工作相关肌肉骨骼疾病（WMSDs）问题的潜在方案。然而，现存的可穿戴机器人采用面临显著障碍，特别是缺乏足够培训劳动力的培训项目，以及缺乏明确的能力框架以确保劳动力的准备就绪。因此，本研究呈现了一项符合系统评价和荟萃分析首选报告项目（PRIMSA）标准的系统文献综述（SLR），旨在探讨在建筑行业实施人机可穿戴机器人（HWR）交互所需的关键知识、技能和能力。通过使用Scopus学术数据库进行文献检索，共获得97篇文章。所有文章均经过定性内容分析，并应用了纳入/排除标准，最终筛选出61篇文章以满足研究目标。SLR的结果显示，从2014年到2024年，HWR交互的出版趋势呈上升态势。研究发现，大多数研究在除非非洲外的所有大洲进行，非洲未发现相关研究。共识别出68项能力，分为知识（如工程原理和人体力学）（32项能力）、技能（如可穿戴机器人操作和人体工程学评估）（20项能力）和能力（如分析思维和适应能力）（16项能力）。为了发展所识别的能力，设计了一个推进HWR交互的概念框架。该框架建议需要进行专业和教育项目改革，以及行业与学术界的合作，以发展能力并推进HWR交互。最后，识别了现有研究中的知识空白，并对未来研究提出了建议。

journal_name: Journal of Construction Engineering and Management
title: A Low-Cost Automatic Indoor Measurement Device with Multisensor Fusion
abstract: Indoor measurement has always been an important process of indoor acceptance, such as the measurement of room structure (depth, bay, height, and wall flatness). Traditionally, these quality assessments rely on manual labor, which is highly subjective and variable. Consequently, automated devices such as terrestrial laser scanners (TLS) have been increasingly adopted for this task, but they cannot be widely used in indoor measurement due to limitations such as high price, poor interpretability, and single sensor. This paper presents a novel low-cost multisensor-based indoor measurement device to compensate for these shortcomings. This research includes: (1) unique mechanical design that transforms sensor information into sparse 3D point cloud data (PCD); (2) plane segmentation based on sparse point cloud; and (3) window opening measurement based on edge detection in dynamic background and monocular camera self-calibration. The reliability of this device was verified through experiments, and the results demonstrated that the device can realize high-precision indoor measurements in less than 5 min for one room.
title_cn: 一种低成本的自动室内测量设备，采用多传感器融合技术
abstract_cn: 室内测量一直是室内验收的重要过程，例如房间结构（深度、间距、高度和墙面平整度）的测量。传统上，这些质量评估依赖于人工劳动，具有高度的主观性和变异性。因此，地面激光扫描仪（TLS）等自动化设备在这一任务中被越来越多地采用，但由于价格高、可解释性差和传感器单一等限制，它们在室内测量中无法广泛应用。本文提出了一种新型低成本的多传感器室内测量设备，以弥补这些不足。该研究包括：（1）独特的机械设计，将传感器信息转化为稀疏的三维点云数据（PCD）；（2）基于稀疏点云的平面分割；以及（3）基于动态背景中的边缘检测和单目相机自校准的窗户开口测量。通过实验验证了该设备的可靠性，结果表明该设备能够在不到5分钟的时间内实现对一个房间的高精度室内测量。

title: Risk transmission and control in the prefabricated construction multi-project supply chain network: a SIS modeling approach
abstract: Purpose The prefabricated construction supply chain (PCSC) is vulnerable to disruption from unforeseen events due to the precise coordination and transportation demands among various sections. This study aims to develop a prefabricated construction multi-project supply chain (PCMSC) risk transmission model to simulate and explain the mechanism of risk transmission in PCMSC. Design/methodology/approach This study constructs a complex network based on contract data of prefabricated construction (PC) projects from a well-known Chinese real estate development company. Four indicators – dependence level, resistance capacity, adaptation capacity and resilience – are incorporated into the SIS model to better adapt to the characteristics of PCSC. When unforeseen events occur, risk transmission paths in PCMSC can be simulated, and suppliers with potential risks can be identified. Findings The premise for risk transmission between projects is to have a common supplier. A high supplier localization rate can mitigate the risk of cross-regional transmission. A strong strategic partner can effectively defend against risk transmission from other areas. Moreover, improving enterprise resilience can effectively control risk transmission. Originality/value This study provides theoretical guidance for the holistic and dynamic analysis of risk transmission in the PCMSC. Meanwhile, this study develops an application framework of the epidemic model for supply chain management research, with specific adaptation to the characteristics of PCMSC and validation in practical case scenarios. In practice, PC project owners can apply the model for risk monitoring and control both in regular production and in unforeseen events.
topics: Supply Chain Resilience and Risk Management
title_cn: 预制建筑多项目供应链网络中的风险传递与控制：一种SIS建模方法
abstract_cn: 目的 预制建筑供应链（PCSC）由于各个环节之间对精确协调和运输的需求，容易受到不可预见事件的干扰。本研究旨在开发一个预制建筑多项目供应链（PCMSC）风险传播模型，以模拟和解释PCMSC中风险传播的机制。 设计/方法论/途径 本研究基于一家知名中国房地产开发公司的预制建筑（PC）项目合同数据构建了一个复杂网络。将依赖程度、抵抗能力、适应能力和韧性四个指标纳入SIS模型，以更好地适应PCSC的特征。当不可预见事件发生时，可以模拟PCMSC中的风险传播路径，并识别出具有潜在风险的供应商。 发现 项目之间风险传播的前提是拥有共同的供应商。较高的供应商本地化率可以减轻跨区域传播的风险。强大的战略合作伙伴可以有效抵御来自其他地区的风险传播。此外，提高企业韧性可以有效控制风险传播。 独创性/价值 本研究为PCMSC中风险传播的整体和动态分析提供了理论指导。同时，本研究开发了一个适用于供应链管理研究的传染病模型应用框架，具体适应PCMSC的特征，并在实际案例场景中进行了验证。在实践中，PC项目业主可以应用该模型进行常规生产和不可预见事件中的风险监测和控制。

title: Toward empowering maritime traffic services: Vessel trajectory representation learning and community detection
abstract: The recent deployment of Automatic Identification System (AIS) enables real-time monitoring of vessel movements, generating massive volumes of navigational data. To extract meaningful behavioral patterns, trajectory clustering has become a key technique for knowledge discovery and decision-making in maritime scenarios, supporting tasks like route optimization, anomaly detection, and situational awareness. However, existing trajectory representation learning methods in maritime scenarios struggle to jointly capture spatial structural and motion dynamics. The non-uniform sampling and varying trajectory lengths also reduce the efficiency of traditional distance-based similarity calculations. Additionally, clustering methods based on pairwise similarity focus on local relationships and struggle to capture global structural relationships among trajectories. To address the aforementioned challenges, this study introduces a generalizable trajectory clustering framework. First, the raw vessel trajectory data are remapped onto two-dimensional grid to construct multi-channel trajectory images, effectively preserving their intrinsic spatiotemporal features. Second, we develop a feature enhance convolutional autoencoder (FE-CAE) that collaboratively models multiple attention modules to integrate spatial structural information and motion semantics in trajectory images, thereby learning discriminative trajectory representations and transforming trajectory similarity in the feature space, enabling fast, efficient and scalable similarity estimation. Finally, we construct trajectory network based on pairwise similarity, in which trajectories with similar navigation behaviors are tightly connected, and apply community detection to identify distinct navigational behavior patterns, thereby establishing a unified paradigm that bridges representation learning and network modeling. Extensive experiments conducted on large-scale AIS datasets from multiple real-world maritime water areas, and demonstrate that the proposed method outperforms widely adopted methods in both clustering efficiency and robustness. Therefore, underscoring the practical significance and wide applicability of the proposed trajectory clustering framework in advancing intelligent vessel traffic service. • A vessel trajectory clustering framework is proposed to identify behavior patterns. • A trajectory representation learning method is introduced by feature autoencoder. • A feature-space similarity-based network is constructed for community detection.
title_cn: 迈向赋能海事交通服务：船舶轨迹表示学习与社区检测
abstract_cn: 最近部署的自动识别系统（AIS）使得船舶运动的实时监测成为可能，生成了大量的导航数据。为了提取有意义的行为模式，轨迹聚类已成为海洋场景中知识发现和决策制定的关键技术，支持航线优化、异常检测和态势感知等任务。然而，现有的海洋场景轨迹表示学习方法在共同捕捉空间结构和运动动态方面存在困难。非均匀采样和轨迹长度的变化也降低了传统基于距离的相似性计算的效率。此外，基于成对相似性的聚类方法侧重于局部关系，难以捕捉轨迹之间的全局结构关系。为了解决上述挑战，本研究提出了一个可推广的轨迹聚类框架。首先，将原始船舶轨迹数据重新映射到二维网格上，构建多通道轨迹图像，有效保留其内在的时空特征。其次，我们开发了一种特征增强卷积自编码器（FE-CAE），该自编码器协同建模多个注意力模块，以整合轨迹图像中的空间结构信息和运动语义，从而学习出具有区分性的轨迹表示，并在特征空间中转化轨迹相似性，实现快速、高效和可扩展的相似性估计。最后，我们基于成对相似性构建轨迹网络，其中具有相似导航行为的轨迹紧密连接，并应用社区检测以识别不同的导航行为模式，从而建立一个统一的范式，桥接表示学习与网络建模。在多个真实海洋水域的大规模AIS数据集上进行的广泛实验表明，所提出的方法在聚类效率和鲁棒性方面均优于广泛采用的方法。因此，强调了所提出的轨迹聚类框架在推动智能船舶交通服务方面的实际意义和广泛适用性。• 提出了一个船舶轨迹聚类框架以识别行为模式。• 通过特征自编码器引入了一种轨迹表示学习方法。• 构建了一个基于特征空间相似性的网络用于社区检测。

journal_name: Journal of Construction Engineering and Management
title: The Impact of Mindful Organizing on Construction Safety Violations: A Moderated Mediation Model
abstract: Although the safety benefits of mindful organizing have been empirically examined, we still know little about the mediating and moderating mechanisms underlying the relationship between mindful organizing and safety violations. Empirical data were collected using a questionnaire administered to 408 Chinese construction workers and were analyzed using structural equation modeling and hierarchical linear regression. The results indicated that mindful organizing influenced safety violations indirectly through both safety moral disengagement (−0.25 and p<0.001) and illegitimate task perception (−0.03 and p<0.05). Furthermore, the effects of mindful organizing on safety violations are moderated by project identification. The findings contribute to the existing body of knowledge by offering a deep understanding of how and when mindful organizing promotes construction safety performance. In practice, this research will enable construction managers to develop appropriate strategies to promote mindful organizing practices for fostering safety behaviors in construction workers.
title_cn: 正念组织对建筑安全违规行为的影响：一个调节中介模型
abstract_cn: 尽管关于有意识的组织方式对安全的益处已有实证研究，但我们对有意识的组织方式与安全违规之间关系的中介和调节机制仍知之甚少。通过问卷调查收集了408名中国建筑工人的实证数据，并采用结构方程模型和分层线性回归进行分析。结果表明，有意识的组织方式通过安全道德脱离（−0.25，p<0.001）和不合法任务感知（−0.03，p<0.05）间接影响安全违规。此外，有意识的组织方式对安全违规的影响受到项目认同的调节。研究结果为现有知识体系提供了深入理解，揭示了有意识的组织方式如何以及何时促进建筑安全绩效。在实践中，这项研究将使建筑管理者能够制定适当的策略，以促进有意识的组织实践，从而培养建筑工人的安全行为。

journal_name: Journal of Construction Engineering and Management
title: Automated Project Rescheduling with Preemptive Activity Splitting for Baseline Restoration
abstract: This paper introduces an automated project scheduling framework tailored to the complexities of construction environments, with a particular emphasis on preemptive activity splitting. The proposed method builds on the preemptive multi-mode resource-constrained project scheduling problem formulation and integrates systems thinking with scenario-based optimization to support dynamic rescheduling decisions. By enabling activities to be interrupted and resumed across alternative modes, the framework better captures real-world project execution dynamics compared to conventional deterministic methods. Weekly baseline plans serve as reference points to guide a rolling-horizon rescheduling process that aims to minimize execution deviations while maintaining cost efficiency. Applied to a mechanical system installation case, the framework achieves a 17.57% reduction in recovery cost relative to conventional compression methods, demonstrating improved adaptability and reduced reliance on extensive input data. These results demonstrate the approach’s strong adaptability and its practical potential for construction planning systems, particularly in volatile project environments.
title_cn: 基于抢占式活动拆分的自动化项目重新调度以恢复基线
abstract_cn: 本文介绍了一种针对建筑环境复杂性的自动化项目调度框架，特别强调了预先活动拆分。所提出的方法基于预先多模式资源约束项目调度问题的构建，并将系统思维与基于情景的优化相结合，以支持动态重新调度决策。通过允许活动在不同模式之间中断和恢复，该框架比传统的确定性方法更好地捕捉了现实项目执行的动态特性。每周的基线计划作为参考点，引导滚动视野的重新调度过程，旨在最小化执行偏差，同时保持成本效率。应用于机械系统安装案例，该框架相较于传统的压缩方法实现了17.57%的恢复成本降低，展示了更强的适应性和对大量输入数据的较低依赖。这些结果表明该方法具有较强的适应性及其在建筑规划系统中的实际潜力，特别是在波动的项目环境中。

title: Introducing “Coping Good” as a Motivational Driver for Non-Professional Project Managers in Hospitals: An Interpretative Framework Inspired by Self-Determination Theory
abstract: Non-professional project managers (NP-PM)-individuals leading projects based on domain expertise rather than formal project management credentials and certifications-play a growing role in hospitals. Despite their prevalence, their impact on project performance remains underexplored. This study introduces “coping good” as a distinctive intrinsic motivation explaining why NP-PM develop project management competencies. Using self-determination theory as an interpretative framework, the study explores how artifact usage, project performance domains alignment, and power skills development contribute to project performance. Analyzing data from 257 NP-PM with structural equation modeling (SEM), results reveal the importance of tailored training and support to enhance project success in resource-constrained settings.
title_cn: 将“应对良好”引入医院非专业项目经理的动机驱动因素：基于自我决定理论的解释性框架
abstract_cn: 非专业项目经理（NP-PM）是指那些基于领域专业知识而非正式项目管理资质和认证来领导项目的个人，他们在医院中的作用日益增长。尽管他们的普遍存在，但他们对项目绩效的影响仍然未得到充分探讨。本研究引入了“应对良好”作为一种独特的内在动机，以解释为何非专业项目经理会发展项目管理能力。该研究以自我决定理论为解释框架，探讨了工具使用、项目绩效领域的一致性以及权力技能发展如何促进项目绩效。通过对257名非专业项目经理的数据进行结构方程模型（SEM）分析，结果揭示了量身定制的培训和支持在资源有限的环境中提升项目成功的重要性。

title: A mixed-methods study of multi-stakeholder perspectives in high-rise residential building evacuations in the UK
title_cn: 一项关于英国高层住宅建筑疏散中多方利益相关者视角的混合方法研究

title: Data-driven estimation of core body temperature during physical activity under heat exposure: A systematic review and standardized evaluation
abstract: Accurate, real-time estimation of core body temperature (CBT) during physical activity is essential for monitoring heat strain and mitigating the risk of heat-related illness under hot environmental conditions. Although numerous data-driven algorithms using wearable sensors have been proposed, their practical reliability remains unclear due to substantial methodological heterogeneity and the absence of standardized evaluation. This study combined a systematic review with a standardized quantitative benchmark. A total of 38 studies employing non-invasive inputs for CBT estimation were identified. Of these, 14 eligible models, including Kalman filter–based methods, statistical models, and machine-learning approaches, were re-implemented and evaluated under identical preprocessing and evaluation settings using two independent datasets: Dataset 1 (treadmill walking, ) and Dataset 2 (cycling, ). The benchmark revealed notable differences between originally reported performance and reproduced performance under standardized conditions. For the widely used heart-rate–based extended Kalman filter, the root mean square error (RMSE) increased from typically reported values of 0.21–0.41 C to 0.41 C on Dataset 1 and 0.66 C on Dataset 2. Incorporating skin temperature improved tracking accuracy in some configurations, but performance gains were highly dependent on measurement site and dataset. Sensitivity for detecting elevated CBT ( 38.0 C) varied markedly across methods, particularly for the cycling protocol. In conclusion, no single CBT estimation approach consistently outperformed others across all settings. Heart-rate–only models provided a stable baseline under limited sensing conditions, whereas multimodal approaches offered conditional benefits in more controlled scenarios. This work establishes a standardized benchmark framework to support fair comparison, method selection, and future development of (wearable) CBT estimation technologies. • Systematic review of core temperature estimation during physical activity in hot environments. • Standardized benchmark across two controlled heat-exposure datasets reveals strong dataset dependence. • Results inform deployment of wearable heat-strain monitoring in occupational and built-environment settings.
title_cn: 在热暴露下进行身体活动时核心体温的数据驱动估计：系统评价与标准化评估
abstract_cn: 在身体活动期间准确、实时地估计核心体温（CBT）对于监测热应激和减轻高温环境下热相关疾病的风险至关重要。尽管已经提出了许多基于可穿戴传感器的数据驱动算法，但由于方法学的显著异质性和缺乏标准化评估，其实际可靠性仍不明确。本研究结合了系统评价和标准化定量基准，共识别出38项采用非侵入性输入进行CBT估计的研究。在这些研究中，14个符合条件的模型，包括基于卡尔曼滤波的方法、统计模型和机器学习方法，经过重新实现并在相同的预处理和评估设置下进行了评估，使用了两个独立的数据集：数据集1（跑步机步行）和数据集2（骑自行车）。基准测试揭示了原始报告性能与在标准化条件下重现性能之间的显著差异。对于广泛使用的基于心率的扩展卡尔曼滤波器，均方根误差（RMSE）从通常报告的0.21-0.41°C增加到数据集1的0.41°C和数据集2的0.66°C。在某些配置中，结合皮肤温度提高了跟踪精度，但性能提升高度依赖于测量位置和数据集。检测升高的CBT（≥38.0°C）的灵敏度在不同方法之间差异显著，特别是在骑自行车协议中。总之，没有单一的CBT估计方法在所有设置中始终优于其他方法。在有限的传感条件下，仅基于心率的模型提供了稳定的基线，而多模态方法在更受控的场景中提供了条件性优势。本研究建立了一个标准化的基准框架，以支持公平比较、方法选择和未来可穿戴CBT估计技术的发展。• 对高温环境中身体活动期间核心温度估计的系统评价。• 在两个受控热暴露数据集上进行的标准化基准揭示了强烈的数据集依赖性。• 结果为在职业和建筑环境中部署可穿戴热应激监测提供了信息。
